a.xlink:title: Language-neutral base class for objects with self-describing runtime parameters.
Stereo / mono calibration runtime contract.
Stage-agnostic filter base class.
Pipeline-facing abstract base for a neural depth network.
Pinhole (OpenCV5/8) stereo-or-mono calibration with canvas-fit remap.
Stereo Kannala–Brandt fisheye calibration with lon/lat (ERP) rectification.
Marker base for filters that consume the metric depth map.
Marker base for filters that consume the raw disparity map.
Marker base for filters that consume the organized 3-D point cloud.
Drops pixels at depth discontinuities — boundary skirts and flyers (depth stage).
Smooths the depth map by per-pixel EMA over consecutive frames (depth stage).
Zeros depth pixels outside the [_min, _max] metre range (depth stage).
Removes small speckle islands from a raw disparity map (disparity stage).
Drops cloud points outside an axis-aligned 3D box (organized-cloud stage).
Per-ray TSDF fusion on the organized cloud (organized-cloud stage).
Removes statistical outlier points from the organized cloud (organized-cloud stage).
Shared partial implementation of DepthInferenceBase.
CREStereo combined stereo with 4 inputs (full + half-resolution pairs).
CREStereo single-pass stereo (raw 0-255 input, disparity = output ch 0).
Mono relative-depth network with a user-tunable affine post-scale.
Fast stereo network with ImageNet normalization; output squeezed to 2D.
Mono metric-depth network with CSTM canonical-focal depth recovery.
